title: WoodCutter+
description: This datapack lets you use the stonecutter to turn any log or plank into all wood variants. Easily craft stripped logs, wood blocks, slabs, and more while keeping a simple, vanilla-friendly experience.
body:
Adds full stonecutter support for all wood types. Turn logs into wood, stripped logs, stripped wood, and cut planks into slabs or stairs.

Oak: log → wood, stripped log, stripped wood; planks → 2 slabs / 1 stair
Spruce: log → wood, stripped log, stripped wood; planks → 2 slabs / 1 stair
Birch: log → wood, stripped log, stripped wood; planks → 2 slabs / 1 stair
Jungle: log → wood, stripped log, stripped wood; planks → 2 slabs / 1 stair
Acacia: log → wood, stripped log, stripped wood; planks → 2 slabs / 1 stair
Dark Oak: log → wood, stripped log, stripped wood; planks → 2 slabs / 1 stair
Mangrove: log → wood, stripped log, stripped wood; planks → 2 slabs / 1 stair
Cherry: log → wood, stripped log, stripped wood; planks → 2 slabs / 1 stair
Pale Oak: log → wood, stripped log, stripped wood; planks → 2 slabs / 1 stair
Crimson: stem → hyphae, stripped stem, stripped hyphae; planks → 2 slabs / 1 stair
Warped: stem → hyphae, stripped stem, stripped hyphae; planks → 2 slabs / 1 stair
